messages.content: Bot1 <MESSAGE>: Good pickup! We're now fully equipped. Both bots should stay close and monitor for hostile spawns. I'll keep watch and we'll defend together if anything appears.

Bot2 <Event>: I have picked up:
- 1 Stone Sword
- 1 Bow
- 24 Arrow
- 1 Leather Tunic
- 12 Bread
- 40 Oak Planks
